message:
✨ Enhance demo data indicators and permission checker

- Add dashed border outline for demo data cards (CardWrapper)
- Add missing CARD_BEHAVIORS for deployment_progress, argocd_sync_status
- Add dropdowns for API groups, user groups, namespaces in CanIChecker
- Add user groups parameter to permission checking API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -85,6 +85,12 @@ const CARD_BEHAVIORS: Record<string, Array<{ key: string; label: string; descrip
     { key: 'alertOnNew', label: 'Alert on new issues', description: 'Notify when new deployment issues appear', default: false },
     { key: 'paginate', label: 'Enable pagination', description: 'Paginate results instead of showing all', default: false },
   ],
+  deployment_progress: [
+    { key: 'autoRefresh', label: 'Auto-refresh', description: 'Update rollout progress periodically', default: true },
+    { key: 'showPercentage', label: 'Show percentage', description: 'Display progress as percentage', default: true },
+    { key: 'alertOnComplete', label: 'Alert on complete', description: 'Notify when rollout completes', default: false },
+    { key: 'alertOnStalled', label: 'Alert on stalled', description: 'Notify when rollout is stuck', default: true },
+  ],
   upgrade_status: [
     { key: 'autoRefresh', label: 'Auto-refresh', description: 'Check for version updates periodically', default: true },
     { key: 'showOnlyUpgradeable', label: 'Show upgradeable only', description: 'Only show clusters with available upgrades', default: false },
@@ -146,6 +152,8 @@ const CARD_BEHAVIORS: Record<string, Array<{ key: string; label: string; descrip
   argocd_sync_status: [
     { key: 'autoRefresh', label: 'Auto-refresh', description: 'Check sync status periodically', default: true },
     { key: 'showHistory', label: 'Show history', description: 'Display recent sync history', default: true },
+    { key: 'showOutOfSync', label: 'Prioritize out-of-sync', description: 'Show out-of-sync apps first', default: true },
+    { key: 'alertOnOutOfSync', label: 'Alert on out-of-sync', description: 'Notify when apps go out of sync', default: false },
   ],
   kustomization_status: [
     { key: 'autoRefresh', label: 'Auto-refresh', description: 'Check Flux kustomizations periodically', default: true },

required for correct permission checks const RESOURCE_API_GROUPS: Record = { // Core API (empty string) @@ -72,30 +97,64 @@ export function CanIChecker() { const [namespace, setNamespace] = useState('') const [customVerb, setCustomVerb] = useState('') const [customResource, setCustomResource] = useState('') - const selectedCluster = cluster || clusters[0] - if (!selectedCluster) return + const targetCluster = cluster || clusters[0] + if (!targetCluster) return const selectedVerb = verb === 'custom' ? customVerb : verb const selectedResource = resource === 'custom' ? customResource : resource if (!selectedVerb || !selectedResource) return - // Auto-detect API group from resource, or use manual override if provided - const autoGroup = RESOURCE_API_GROUPS[selectedResource] - const effectiveGroup = group || autoGroup + // Determine effective API group + const effectiveApiGroup = apiGroup === 'custom' + ? customApiGroup + : apiGroup || RESOURCE_API_GROUPS[selectedResource] + + // User groups for permission check + const groups = selectedUserGroups.length > 0 ? selectedUserGroups : undefined await checkPermission({ - cluster: selectedCluster, + cluster: targetCluster, verb: selectedVerb, resource: selectedResource, namespace: namespace || undefined, - group: effectiveGroup !== undefined ? effectiveGroup : undefined, + group: effectiveApiGroup !== undefined ? effectiveApiGroup : undefined, + groups, }) - }, [cluster, clusters, verb, customVerb, resource, customResource, namespace, group, checkPermission]) + }, [cluster, clusters, verb, customVerb, resource, customResource, namespace, apiGroup, customApiGroup, selectedUserGroups, checkPermission]) const handleReset = useCallback(() => { reset() @@ -104,7 +163,10 @@ export function CanIChecker() { setNamespace('') setCustomVerb('') setCustomResource('') -
